title: Retired Legacy Analytics Tag Write Shells
summary: Removed the old analytics tag Jekyll route shells and the browser fallback to the standalone 8787 tag write server.
effect: Tag writes now resolve through local Studio runtime config and /studio/api/analytics endpoints only; the browser no longer has hardcoded 127.0.0.1:8787 tag write fallback URLs. bin/dev-studio no longer starts scripts/analytics/tag_write_server.py by default, and the migrated analytics tag pages are no longer Jekyll route shells. The deprecated tag-server /build-docs route remains intentionally unmigrated.
verification: node --check passed for assets/studio/js/studio-transport.js, assets/studio/js/studio-navigation.js, assets/studio/js/tag-registry-service.js, assets/studio/js/tag-aliases-service.js, and assets/studio/js/tag-aliases.js
Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app server, route smoke, promotion smoke, and tag registry module smoke files
tests/smoke/tag_registry_modules.py passed with loopback server permissions
